# Cleanup Solution

Use the `reset-calculator-lab` skill to perform the generated-workspace portion
of Exercise 99.09. Preview the bundled script with `-WhatIf`, report the source
and preservation paths, and obtain explicit confirmation before execution.
Follow section 1.13 of
`docs/prd-csharp-basic-calculator-solution.md`. Do not recreate or duplicate the
bundled `Remove-DotnetSlnForCalculator.ps1` script.
